// Hello, World!

DANIEL

19-year-old dev from the future, building today. I live where code meets creativity — from bare-metal C to beautiful React interfaces.

SCROLL
// 01 ABOUT ME

Hi, I'm Daniel

I'm a 19-year-old software developer with a deep passion for programming, computer engineering, and physics. My journey started young — drawn to the raw elegance of low-level C programming where every byte matters and nothing is abstracted away.

From there I fell in love with Linux — the OS for hackers and builders — where I learned how operating systems tick, how processes work, and what it truly means to control your machine.

Today I build full-stack applications, interactive web experiences, and video games. I believe great software is half science, half art — and I pursue both relentlessly.

C / C++LinuxReactJavaScriptPythonGame DevPhysicsOpen Source

// 02 MY JOURNEY

The Programming Story

⚡
2016

The C Beginning

Started my coding journey with C — the language of legends. Learned about memory management, pointers, and why computers do what they do at the bare metal level. Wrote my first programs on a Linux terminal and never looked back.

CMemoryAlgorithmsTerminal
🐧
2018

Falling for Linux

Installed Linux for the first time and it changed everything. Learned bash scripting, system administration, file systems, and how the kernel orchestrates the hardware. Linux became my permanent home.

LinuxBashKernelOpen Source
⚛
2021

Web & React Era

Ventured into web development, then discovered React — and the world of component-based UI clicked instantly. Started building interactive UIs, APIs, and full-stack applications with real users.

ReactJavaScriptHTML/CSSNode.js
🚀
2023

Software Developer

Leveled up to full software development — building DAWs, game engines, web apps, and collaborative tools. Every project teaches me something new and pushes the boundaries of what I can create.

Full-StackGame DevDAWSystems
∞
NOW

The Journey Continues

Always learning, always building. Currently exploring physics simulations, generative systems, and next-gen web experiences. The best code I've ever written is the code I haven't written yet.

PhysicsAIInnovation∞
// 03 PROJECTS

Things I've Built

🎛️
FEATURED

Collaborative DAW

Digital Audio Workstation

A full-featured browser-based DAW with multi-track editing, waveform visualization, real-time collaboration via Supabase, and Google OAuth authentication.

ReactWeb Audio APISupabaseOAuth
VIEW ON GITHUB ↗
🎹
FEATURED

Qt DAW — Desktop Edition

Native C++ Music Production

A desktop-native music production application built in Qt6/C++ with a vintage 80s aesthetic, multi-track sequencer, audio recording, and playback engine.

C++Qt6Audio EngineLinux
VIEW ON GITHUB ↗
🌳
ACADEMIC

Binary Search Tree Lab

Data Structures in C

A complete BST implementation in C covering insertion, deletion, height calculation, and parent-finding helper algorithms — demonstrating deep understanding of recursive tree operations.

CAlgorithmsData Structures
VIEW ON GITHUB ↗
🐞
AI/ML

Insect Identifier AI

Computer Vision with Python

An AI-powered insect identification tool with confidence level visualization, real-time image classification, and a clean interface for nature enthusiasts and researchers.

PythonAI/MLOpenCVComputer Vision
VIEW ON GITHUB ↗
🔧
EMBEDDED

Stack Data Structure

Embedded Systems in C++

A hardware Stack implementation in C++ with DS3231 RTC integration for timestamped operations — Push, Pop, IsEmpty, IsFull — running on microcontroller hardware.

C++EmbeddedHardwareArduino
VIEW ON GITHUB ↗
🎮
IN PROGRESS

Game Project

Coming Soon

An upcoming game development project combining physics simulation, procedural generation, and real-time rendering. Built with passion for interactive experiences.
